Label: Warenlager
Sql: SELECT kWarenLager AS Id, cKuerzel + ' — ' + cName AS Display FROM dbo.tWarenLager ORDER BY kWarenLager

Label: Shops
Sql: SELECT kShop AS Id, cName + CASE WHEN nAktiv = 1 THEN '' ELSE ' (inaktiv)' END AS Display FROM dbo.tShop ORDER BY kShop

Label: Kundengruppen
Sql: SELECT kKundenGruppe AS Id, cName AS Display FROM dbo.tKundenGruppe ORDER BY kKundenGruppe

Label: Zahlungsarten
Sql: SELECT kZahlungsart AS Id, cName AS Display FROM dbo.tZahlungsart ORDER BY cName

Label: Versandarten
Sql: SELECT kVersandArt AS Id, cName AS Display FROM dbo.tversandart ORDER BY cName

Label: Lieferanten
Sql: SELECT kLieferant AS Id, ISNULL(cLiefNr, '') + ' — ' + cFirma AS Display FROM dbo.tLieferant ORDER BY cFirma

Label: Sprachen
Sql: SELECT kSprache AS Id, cISO + ' — ' + cNameDeutsch AS Display FROM DbeS.vSprache ORDER BY kSprache

Label: Steuerklassen
Sql: SELECT kSteuerklasse AS Id, cName AS Display FROM dbo.tSteuerklasse ORDER BY kSteuerklasse

Label: Firmen
Sql: SELECT kFirma AS Id, cName AS Display FROM dbo.tfirma ORDER BY kFirma

Label: Ameise Export-Vorlagen
Sql: SELECT ev.kExportVorlage AS Id, ev.cName + ' [' + ISNULL(et.cName, '') + ']' AS Display FROM dbo.ameise_exportvorlage ev LEFT JOIN dbo.ameise_exporttyp et ON et.kExportTyp = ev.kExportTyp WHERE ev.nDeleted = 0 ORDER BY ev.cName

Label: Ameise Import-Vorlagen
Sql: SELECT iv.kImportVorlage AS Id, iv.cName + ' [' + ISNULL(it.cName, '') + ']' AS Display FROM dbo.ameise_importvorlage iv LEFT JOIN dbo.ameise_importtyp it ON it.kImportTyp = iv.kImportTyp WHERE iv.nDeleted = 0 ORDER BY iv.cName
